module.name: prefer-string-raw
module.description: Prefer String.raw for string literals containing escaped backslashes (Sonar S7780).

scenarios.name: should allow a string literal with no backslash escapes
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the string literal

scenarios.name: should allow a String.raw tagged template literal
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the tagged template

scenarios.name: should report a string literal containing an escaped backslash
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the string literal

scenarios.name: should report a regular expression-like string with escape sequences
scenarios.when: the rule evaluates the string literal
